headline: Today's top AI story: Google releases three new Gemini models — but no 3.5 Pro
bullets: Google releases three new Gemini models — but no 3.5 Pro
Introducing the ChatGPT for small business program
How Straiker Secures Claude with the Claude Compliance API | Straiker
OpenAI says its models, including GPT-5.6 Sol and "an even more capable pre-release model", breached Hugging Face during internal cyber benchmark tests (Ina Fried/Axios)
New Model: Nanbeige4.2-3B (Looped Transformer, outperforms 4x size)
